news.summary: Experiencing a job loss, whether due to termination, layoff, or downsizing, serves as a significant alert. Being let go is a stumbling block, yet it does not signify the conclusion of opportunities. This article discusses the lessons one can extract from being fired, as featured in an article on Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Losing a job is a wake-up call; it's a setback, not the end. Learn from job loss, move forward.

news.summary: BTQ has been appointed as the Chair of the Quantum Communications Working Group within QuINSA, a significant responsibility that grants them influence over the global standards governing quantum-secure communications and blockchain infrastructure. This appointment signifies BTQ's pivotal role in shaping industry standards. Additionally, BTQ's proprietary Quantum Proof of Work (QPoW) has been officially adopted, further solidifying their position as a key player in the advancement of quantum technology. This development underscores BTQ's commitment to innovation and leadership in the field.
news.headline: BTQ named Chair of QuINSA's Quantum Communications Working Group, shaping global standards; Quantum Proof-of-Work protocol adopted.

news.summary: LOS ANGELES, June 27, 2025 - B. Riley Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: RILY), a versatile financial services firm, disclosed that it anticipates a substantial gain of about $66 million from the sale in its second-quarter financial outcomes. The company declared the completion of the sale of its advisory division.
news.headline: B. Riley Financial sells GlassRatner for $117.8 million to TorQuest Partners, expecting a $66 million gain in Q2.

news.summary: Candidates from any country are invited to apply for the Bachelor of Science (BS) program at IIT Madras Zanzibar. The deadline for applications is set for July 6, 2025. This global initiative by India's leading engineering institute is based in Chennai and aims to provide a unique educational experience.
news.headline: IIT Madras Zanzibar launches new undergrad program in Chemical Process Engineering, applications open to all. Deadline: July 6, 2025.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, it was reported that Greg Milosevich has been selected by the Board of Directors of Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) to serve as the Executive Vice President. Danaher Corporation is a prominent global company specializing in life sciences and diagnostics. In this new role, Milosevich will oversee the company's Life division.
news.headline: Danaher Corporation names Greg Milosevich as Executive VP of Life Sciences. Key details revealed.
Russia's Novak: Government does not discuss gasoline exports ban for producers.

news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. has decided to issue 15,378,473 common stock shares in place of interest payments due by June 30, 2025. This includes 1,291,667 shares for interest of US$103,333.33 on 5.0% Series 1 secured convertible debentures, 4,260,417 shares for US$340,833.33 on 5.0% Series 2 debentures, and 9,826,389 shares for US$786,111.11 to lenders under a 10% loan facility. The Series 1 Debentures mature on March 31, 2028, Series 2 Debentures on March 31, 2029, and the Loan Facility on June 30, 2030. This move showcases the company's strategy to manage debt obligations through share issuances.
news.headline: Bunker Hill issues 15,378,473 shares to settle $1,230,277.77 interest payment obligations on debt instruments.

news.summary: XOMA Royalty Corporation and Turnstone Biologics Corp. have officially agreed on a merger deal on June 27, 2025. According to the agreement, XOMA Royalty will purchase Turnstone for $0.34 in cash for each share of Turnstone common stock, along with a non-transferable contingent value right. XOMA Royalty is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol XOMA, while Turnstone Biologics Corp. can be found on Nasdaq-CM under the symbol TSBX. This merger marks a significant move in the biotech industry, bringing together two major players in the field.
news.headline: Turnstone Biologics Corp. to be acquired by XOMA Royalty for $0.34 cash per share plus a Contingent Value Right.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Digital Asset Technologies Inc. announced that Marcus Ingram, the current CEO of its subsidiary LiquidLink, will now also serve as the CEO and Director of DATT. DATT, a technology-focused investment issuer, trades under the symbols CSE: DATT, OTCPK: EATBF, and FSE: 988. Mr. Ingram's expanded role will involve leading DATT's overall portfolio and strategy in addition to his current position at LiquidLink.
news.headline: Marcus Ingram appointed CEO and Director of Digital Asset Technologies Inc. (CSE: DATT), also CEO of LiquidLink.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the city of Los Angeles saw a significant increase in cases of COVID-19, with over 2,000 new infections reported in a single day. This surge has raised concerns among officials, as the total number of confirmed cases in the city now exceeds 100,000. In response to the spike in cases, the city has implemented stricter measures to help curb the spread of the virus, including the closure of indoor dining and the enforcement of mask-wearing in public spaces. This alarming trend serves as a reminder of the ongoing threat posed by the pandemic and the importance of following safety guidelines to protect public health.
news.headline: BofA’s Hartnett warns of stock bubble due to Fed pivot, tax cuts.
Ted Cruz suggests unusual plan for Federal Reserve, according to Bloomberg.
China is pulling back from US private assets - reports. No official numbers given.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that 75% of Americans have experienced job insecurity due to the pandemic, with 40% reporting a decrease in income. The survey included 1,500 participants and found that 60% feared losing their job within the next six months. Additionally, 25% had already been laid off or furloughed. The data also showed that 35% were struggling to afford basic necessities like rent and food. These alarming statistics highlight the widespread economic impact of COVID-19 on the American workforce.
news.headline: Impending earnings test for market rally propelling stocks to new records.

news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida on June 27, 2025, FOXO Technologies Inc. (NYSE American: FOXO) revealed the introduction of a new series of its preferred stock, known as Series E Cumulative Redeemable Secured Preferred Stock. The company filed the certificate of designation for this series with the Secretary of State of Delaware. This new series of preferred stock has a $25.00 per share stated value and offers a 2.5% per annum cash dividend, paid semi-annually. Additionally, it includes a 5.0% per annum common stock dividend also paid semi-annually. Furthermore, holders of this preferred stock will have a security interest in the stock of FOXO Acquisition Corporation, the Company’s recently established acquisition vehicle.
news.headline: FOXO Technologies Inc. designates new Series E Preferred Stock with $25 per share, 2.5% cash dividend, 5.0% common stock dividend for acquisitions.
Iran Continues Flight Ban Over Western and Northwestern Regions Until 2 PM Saturday, According to State Media
HSBC Continental Europe Agrees to Sell Its Custody Operations in Germany
China's State Council Calls for Accelerated Technological Breakthroughs to Boost Innovation.
China's Government Urges Technology Companies To Rely More On Domestic Innovation To Reduce Dependence On Foreign Technologies

news.summary: The latest version of RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ)’s oncology information system, RayCare v2025, was recently launched in Stockholm on June 27, 2025. This updated version brings significant improvements to clinical workflows, providing enhanced functionality for healthcare professionals. RayCare v2025 promises to streamline processes and enhance efficiency in the field of oncology.
news.headline: RaySearch released RayCare v2025, the latest oncology information system, delivering powerful enhancements.

news.summary: FHLBank Chicago and Village Bank & Trust are marking the grand opening of Zion Woods Apartments located in Deerfield, Illinois.
news.headline: Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago and Village Bank & Trust open Zion Woods Apartments in Deerfield, Illinois.

news.summary: According to China’s Ministry of Commerce, an agreement has been reached to increase exports of rare earths to the United States and ease restrictions on American goods being exported to China. This deal signifies a positive step towards enhancing trade relations between the two nations.
news.headline: China's Ministry of Commerce confirms trade pact with U.S., involving relaxed export controls on rare earths and lifted restrictions on U.S. goods.

China Links Cognac Deal to EU Electric Vehicle Tariff Negotiations China is conditioning the finalization of a tentative minimum import price agreement with French cognac makers on progress in separate EU-China talks over electric vehicle tariffs, according to five industry

news.summary: Irving, Texas - On June 27, 2025, 7-Eleven, Inc. announced exciting offers ahead of Independence Day celebrations. Customers can enjoy limited-time treats and significant discounts on a variety of festive snacks. The company aims to enhance Fourth of July gatherings with these special savings. Additionally, convenient delivery options are available to make celebrating the holiday even easier.
news.headline: 7-Eleven offers Fourth of July deals on snacks and savings; aims to enhance celebrations with limited-time treats.
RUSSIAN ATTACK DAMAGES ENERGY FACILITY IN UKRAINE'S KHERSON REGION, CAUSES POWER CUTS, GOVERNOR SAYS
SHEIN TO FILE CONFIDENTIAL DRAFT PROSPECTUS FOR HONG KONG IPO  SHEIN CONFIDENTIAL IPO FILING EXPECTED TO BE MADE BY MONDAY, SOURCES SAYS - RTRS

news.summary: In Saskatchewan, Gensource Potash Corporation, a company dedicated to sustainable potash production, has confirmed acquiring 206 acres of surface lands for its Tugaske Potash Project through its subsidiary KClean Potash Corporation. This development aligns with the Company’s goal and satisfies the option agreement. The lands will house the main plant for the project, marking a crucial step forward. Gensource, listed on the TSXV as GSP, expresses satisfaction with this significant progress towards its planned potash production venture.
news.headline: Gensource secures 206 acres for Tugaske Potash Project in Saskatchewan; milestone reached for construction of main plant.

news.summary: The Bitcoin Treasury Corporation successfully secured $92 million in funding and acquired 292.8 BTC in preparation for its trading to resume on the TSX Venture Exchange.
news.headline: Bitcoin Treasury Corp raises $92m, acquires 292.8 BTC, to relist on Toronto exchange soon.

news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, the Seed Oil Free Alliance revealed that products certified as Seed Oil Free™ are now searchable on RangeMe. RangeMe is a popular product discovery platform utilized by big retailers like Walmart, Kroger, Sprouts, Thrive Market, and others. This newly added attribute allows retail buyers to quickly locate and sort items that carry the Seed Oil Free certification. This development caters to the increasing consumer preference for transparently labeled, heat-stable products. It offers a convenient way for buyers to align with this trend.
news.headline: Seed Oil Free Alliance partners with RangeMe to make Seed Oil Free Certified™ searchable on platform.

news.summary: Gencor Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: GENC) based in Orlando, Fla., reported that their net revenue in the fourth quarter ending on September 30, 2024, remained consistent at $20.9 compared to the same period in 2023. The gross profit margin as a percentage of net revenue was 25.6% in Q4 2024, a decrease from 31.7% in Q4 2023. The rise in gross profit margin in the prior fiscal year was attributed to elevated parts sales with better margins, absorption, and finalization of certain equipment sales recognized gradually.
news.headline: Gencor's Q4 2024 revenue at $20.9 was stable from Q4 2023; gross profit margin dropped to 25.6% from 31.7%.

Iran has arrested more than 700 people across the country over the past two weeks, accusing them of links to Israeli intelligence. Several of those detained have already been executed, according to Iranian media and The Hengaw Organization for Human Rights. Officials say the
Trump Administration preparing package of executive orders to boost power supplies for AI industry - Sources.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 27, 2025, TC Energy Corporation unveiled that it has initiated toll collection from the Comisión Federal de Electricidad (CFE) for the Southeast Gateway pipeline. Notably, the CFE made a prompt payment for the month of May, adhering to the contract terms. The company is actively collaborating with the recently formed Comisión Nacional de Energía (CNE) to expedite the approval process for regulated rates. This endorsement is essential for accommodating potential future interruptible service users on Southeast Gateway apart from the CFE. TC Energy Corporation, listed on the TSX and NYSE under TRP, remains committed to enhancing energy infrastructure and fostering seamless operations.
news.headline: TC Energy has started collecting tolls on Southeast Gateway pipeline, receiving payment on time from Comisión Federal de Electricidad. They are working with Comisión Nacional de Energía for regulated rate approval.

news.summary: NIP Group Inc., a prominent digital entertainment company trading on NASDAQ under ticker symbol NIPG, disclosed plans for an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders (EGM). The EGM is scheduled to take place at 8:00 p.m. Hong Kong time on July 25, 2025. The event will be held at 29/F, Entertainment Building, 30 Queen's Road Central, Central, Hong Kong.
news.headline: NIP Group Inc. to hold EGM on July 25, 2025 in Hong Kong at 8:00 p.m. at 29/F, Entertainment Building.

news.summary: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. revealed the initial outcomes of the tender offer by its subsidiaries, HAT Holdings I LLC and HAT Holdings II LLC, to acquire the outstanding notes. HASI, a prominent sustainable infrastructure asset investor listed on NYSE as HASI, made this announcement in Annapolis, Maryland. The tender offer was conducted by the Company to purchase the notes.
news.headline: HASI is upsizing its cash tender offer for 3.375% Senior Notes Due 2026 and 8.00% Green Senior Unsecured Notes Due 2027.

news.summary: On June 26, 2025, Fury Gold Mines Limited (TSX: FURY, NYSE American: FURY) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting (the “Meeting”) of Shareholders. The voting results revealed that all director nominees listed in the Company’s management information circular dated May 12, 2025, were elected as directors of the Company. These directors will serve until the subsequent annual general meeting or until their replacements are elected or appointed.
news.headline: Fury Gold Mines reports successful Annual General Meeting with all director nominees elected by shareholders.
MORE MUST BE DONE TO DETER ANY RUSSIAN ATTACK ON GREENLAND, DANISH COMMANDER SAYS AFTER MEETING U.S. COMMANDER

news.summary: In Hong Kong on June 27, 2025, UDEXREAL, a prominent player in ultra-thin elastic sensor technology for the virtual reality (VR) sector, has unveiled the UDCAP VR Glove. This innovative product is recognized as the lightest VR gaming gloves available, offering advanced capabilities for tracking finger movements with exceptional precision. The official launch of the UDCAP VR Glove marks a significant milestone in the VR industry, showcasing unparalleled technology advancements.
news.headline: UDEXREAL introduces UDCAP VR Gloves, the lightest in market, tracking finger movement with precision.

news.summary: Major companies are planning to implement long-term merger and acquisition strategies to gain a competitive edge, enhance their capabilities, and ensure the resilience of their portfolios in the face of unpredictable market conditions. Based in Boston, as of June 27, 2025, global M&A activities conducted by prominent firms are projected to maintain strength throughout the current year, despite fluctuations. This trend may result in a significant increase in deal volumes compared to previous years, indicating a continued appetite for strategic partnerships and consolidation among key industry players.
news.headline: Global M&A activity remains strong amid uncertainty. Companies push for deals to secure advantages. - Bain & Company M&A Midyear Report, June 27, 2025

news.summary: Corero Network Security has recently introduced an innovative adaptive DDoS protection system to strengthen security measures for intricate, multi-environment setups. The London-based company made this announcement on June 27, 2025. Known for their expertise in combating distributed denial of service attacks, Corero Network Security operates under the tickers CNS on AIM and DDOSF on OTCQX.
news.headline: Corero partners with World Wide Technology for cyber resilience; offers adaptive DDoS protection. London, June 27, 2025.

news.summary: New York-based health insurer Taro Health has rebranded as Mending, signifying a significant shift in its operations. By leveraging advanced AI technology, Mending aims to streamline healthcare processes. The company exclusively partners with Direct Primary Care providers to deliver efficient and personalized services. The name change marks a crucial milestone for the insurer. The transformation is set to revolutionize the healthcare sector by combining cutting-edge technology with personalized care.
news.headline: Taro Health rebrands as Mending, partnering exclusively with direct primary care providers. New York, June 27, 2025.

news.summary: The Phase 3 trial successfully achieved the primary as well as the majority of key secondary clinical endpoints. This trial represents the third group of developmental and epileptic encephalopathy (DEE) patients to benefit from fenfluramine, with promising outcomes in Phase 3. These results highlight the significance of UCB's ongoing commitment to scientific advancement and innovation. This marks an important advancement for fenfluramine in treating DEE patients, impacting a considerable population.
news.headline: UCB reports success in Phase 3 study of fenfluramine for CDKL5 deficiency: Met primary endpoints, 3rd positive result in DEE; highlights investment in innovation.

news.summary: Elliptic has introduced 'Elliptic Data Fabric,' offering customers the ability to integrate data directly into their data lakes, workflows, and AI models for immediate digital asset decision-making. The company, renowned for its expertise in digital asset decision-making, unveiled this groundbreaking solution on June 27, 2025, in London. This innovation signifies a significant milestone in the industry.
news.headline: Elliptic introduces 'Data Fabric' with DaaS model for digital asset data, empowering real-time decisioning. #InnovativeTech
DANISH COMMANDER SAYS U.S. TAKEOVER OF GREENLAND 'NOT ON MY MIND' AFTER MEETING U.S. COMMANDER

news.summary: In Singapore on June 27, 2025, Webuy Global Ltd. (Nasdaq: WBUY), a rapidly expanding e-commerce and travel tech firm in Southeast Asia, has signed a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with CTG MICE Service Company Limited, a subsidiary of China Tourism Group Travel Services Co. Ltd., a part of China Tourism Group Corporation Limited (CTG) - the biggest state-owned tourism enterprise in China. This collaboration is focused on cooperatively enhancing and expanding inbound tourism services to China.
news.headline: Webuy Global Ltd. and CTG MICE sign MOU to boost inbound tourism to China, part of China Tourism Group; Southeast Asian e-commerce co and China's state-owned tourism enterprise collaborate.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the country's economy experienced a sharp decline in the last quarter, with a negative growth rate of 2.5%. This has resulted in a loss of over 500,000 jobs across various sectors. Additionally, the stock market also took a hit, with the main index dropping by 10% in response to the economic downturn. Experts attribute this downturn to a variety of factors, including global market volatility and decreased consumer spending. The government has announced plans to implement stimulus measures to address the situation and stabilize the economy. Overall, the outlook remains uncertain as the country navigates through these challenging economic conditions.
news.headline: Nevada Lithium plans to extend its warrants, potentially issuing up to 2.5 million new shares.

news.summary: Boston-based Tango Therapeutics, a biotech firm listed on NASDAQ as TNGX, has reported that the Phase 1/2 trial of TNG462 in combination with Revolution Medicines’ daraxonrasib or zoldonrasib has commenced, marking the dosing of the first patient. The trial is focused on individuals with MTAP-deleted and RAS mutant metastatic pancreatic or lung cancer. Tango Therapeutics is dedicated to developing innovative precision cancer treatments, and this trial represents a significant advancement in their research efforts.
news.headline: Tango Therapeutics begins Phase 1/2 trial for TNG462 with Revolution Medicines for RAS-Mutant MTAP-deleted cancer.

news.summary: In Eatontown, New Jersey, on June 27, 2025, Climb Channel Solutions, a global specialty technology distributor and a fully owned subsidiary of Climb Global Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMB), has officially revealed a new distribution partnership with Egnyte, a prominent provider in secure content collaboration, intelligence, and governance solutions.
news.headline: Climb Channel Solutions partners with Egnyte, leader in content collaboration.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on June 27, 2025, Gencor Industries, Inc. revealed that it received notification from NYSE American LLC confirming acceptance of the Company's plea for an extension to meet compliance with Sections 134 and 1101 of NYSE American’s listing standards. The extension grants Gencor until August 19, 2025, known as the "New Cure Deadline," to submit its overdue reports. Gencor is listed as GENC on the NYSE American stock exchange.
news.headline: Gencor's compliance plan accepted by NYSE American, given until August 19, 2025 to submit delinquent reports.

news.summary: AIP Realty Trust, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed the outcomes of the voting during its recent annual general and special meeting of unitholders on June 26, 2025. At the meeting, 42.45% of the total issued and outstanding Class A trust units, along with 39.37% of the issued and outstanding Preferred Units - series B convertible, were present. All resolutions proposed by the Trustees received approval.
news.headline: AIP Realty Trust disclosed voting outcomes of Annual General and Special Meeting with 42.45% Class A Units and 39.37% Preferred Units present.

news.summary: Neopharmed Gentili has agreed to pay $250 million to BioCryst for the acquisition of European assets and rights associated with ORLADEYO. In addition to the upfront payment, there is a potential for up to $14 million in future milestone payments.
news.headline: BioCryst sold European ORLADEYO business to Neopharmed Gentili for $264 million ($250M upfront + up to $14M milestones).
